message:
feat(stdlib): add platform-specific modules (_winapi, _tkinter, nt, msvcrt, etc.)

Add 17 platform-specific and remaining stdlib modules:
- Windows: _winapi, _overlapped, _msi, _wmi, nt, msvcrt, msilib, nturl2path
- macOS: _osx_support, _scproxy
- AIX: _aix_support
- Unix: _posixshmem, ossaudiodev, nis
- GUI: _tkinter
- Tools: lib2to3, pydoc_data

files.patch:
